category_sources: source_facts.description says taxonomic sequence classification system; official Kraken 2 README and wiki manual describe a DNA taxonomic sequence classifier.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Kraken 2; source_facts.name is kraken2.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki manual and repository docs/MANUAL.markdown are the documented operating manual surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/DerrickWood/kraken2; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Kraken 2 manual describe taxonomic classification of DNA sequences and metagenomic analysis.
